creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Dependencies from master branches on Github is very very likely untenable for ports.

iirc, there was a fledgling implementation of a bsd.go.mk (possibly now in USES=go form) that aimed to address the question of Go dependency management in the ports framework.

CC'ing current lang/golang maintainer in on this, who may be able to provide more detail.
